pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Evangelion Eva13 (New Paint Ver.) 1000%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Evangelion Eva13 (New Paint Ver.) 1000% Collectible Figure!  This figure stands at approximately 27.55' tall and features a new paint version of the artificial human, Eva-13 from the hit series Evangelion.  Be sure to add this collectible figure set to your collection today!
